name: capacitylens-server
description: SQLite-backed REST API for CapacityLens. Imports the shared domain core so server and client validation cannot drift.

scripts.start:e2e: node scripts/check-node.mjs && CAPACITYLENS_ALLOW_RESET=1 CAPACITYLENS_DB=.e2e.db tsx src/index.ts
scripts.start:auth-e2e: node scripts/check-node.mjs && rm -f .auth-e2e.db .auth-e2e.db-wal .auth-e2e.db-shm && PORT=8887 CAPACITYLENS_DB=.auth-e2e.db SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_MODE=password CAPACITYLENS_CREATE_ADMIN_ADMIN=1 CAPACITYLENS_BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD=auth-e2e-password-2026 SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD_BREACH_CHECK=off SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_ALLOW_OPEN_SIGNUP=1 CAPACITYLENS_MULTI_ACCOUNT=1 CAPACITYLENS_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN=auth-e2e-bootstrap-token-0123456789abcdef SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_SECRET=capacitylens-auth-e2e-secret-0123456789abcdef SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:8887 CAPACITYLENS_CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5373,http://127.0.0.1:5373 tsx src/index.ts
scripts.start:oidc-e2e: node scripts/check-node.mjs && rm -f .oidc-e2e.db .oidc-e2e.db-wal .oidc-e2e.db-shm && PORT=8897 CAPACITYLENS_DB=.oidc-e2e.db SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE=hosted-oidc-only SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_MODE=sso SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_SECRET=capacitylens-oidc-e2e-secret-0123456789abcdef SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:5473 SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_OIDC_CLIENT_ID=capacitylens-e2e SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET=capacitylens-e2e-secret SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_OIDC_DISCOVERY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5557/dex/.well-known/openid-configuration SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_OIDC_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:5556/dex SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_OIDC_SCOPES='openid profile email' SMALLSASS_ACCOUNT_OIDC_BOOTSTRAP_EMAILS=oidc-owner@example.com CAPACITYLENS_CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5473,http://127.0.0.1:5473 tsx src/index.ts
